---
title: "05_Final_script"
author: Judy Hua Zhu, Trudy Jiang
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-21"
---

# 01 read all data
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
read_excel(here("Data", "load.xlsx"))
load <- read_excel("Data/load.xlsx")
temp <- read_excel("Data/temperature.xlsx")
humidity <- read_excel("Data/relative_humidity.xlsx")
```

```{r}
# check structure
str(load)
str(temp)
str(humidity)

# check first few rows
head(load)
head(temp)
head(humidity)
```

```{r}
# process load to daily average
daily_load <- load %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    daily_avg = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("h")), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(date, daily_avg)

head(daily_load)
str(daily_load)

# process temperature
daily_temp <- temp %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    temp_avg_hour = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("t_ws")), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(daily_temp = mean(temp_avg_hour, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

head(daily_temp)
str(daily_temp)

# process humidity
daily_humidity <- humidity %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    humidity_avg_hour = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("rh_ws")), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(daily_humidity = mean(humidity_avg_hour, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

head(daily_humidity)
str(daily_humidity)

# check NA in temp
sum(is.na(daily_temp$date))

# inspect problematic rows
daily_temp %>%
  filter(is.na(date))

daily_temp <- daily_temp %>%
  filter(!is.na(date))

sum(is.na(daily_temp$date))
range(daily_temp$date)
dim(daily_temp)
```

```{r}
# merge all datasets
data_all <- daily_load %>%
  left_join(daily_temp, by = "date") %>%
  left_join(daily_humidity, by = "date")

head(data_all)
str(data_all)
colSums(is.na(data_all))
```


# 02 exploratory analysis
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(forecast)
```

```{r}
# load processed data
source("Scripts/01_read_all_data.R")

# split data based on instructor prompt
train_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2005-01-01") &
           date <= as.Date("2010-06-30"))

valid_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2010-07-01") &
           date <= as.Date("2010-07-31"))
```

```{r}
# create msts object for training data
ts_train_msts <- msts(
  train_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365)
)
```

```{r}
# validation series only for plotting
ts_valid_msts <- msts(
  valid_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365)
)

# quick plot of training series
autoplot(ts_train_msts) +
  ggtitle("Training Daily Electricity Load")
```

```{r}
# baseline model: TBATS
fit_tbats <- tbats(ts_train_msts)

# forecast 31 days for validation period
fc_tbats <- forecast(fit_tbats, h = 31)

# plot forecast vs actual validation data
autoplot(fc_tbats) +
  autolayer(ts_valid_msts, series = "Actual") +
  ggtitle("TBATS Forecast vs Actuals")

# accuracy on validation set
accuracy(as.numeric(fc_tbats$mean), valid_data$daily_avg)
```

```{r}
# current MAPE is 11.31%, retrain on all data and generate one sample submission
full_train_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2005-01-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2011-06-30"))

ts_full_msts <- msts(
  full_train_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

final_fit <- tbats(
  ts_full_msts,
  use.box.cox = NULL,
  use.trend = TRUE,
  use.damped.trend = TRUE
)

final_fc <- forecast(final_fit, h = 31)
```

```{r}
# build submission file

submission <- data.frame(
  date = seq(as.Date("2011-07-01"), as.Date("2011-07-31"), by = "day"),
  load = as.numeric(final_fc$mean)
)

write.csv(
  submission,
  file = "Output/submission_basic_tbats.csv",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = TRUE
)
```


# 03 basic models
In this chunk, we test basic models of TBATS,ETS and Dynamic harmonic regression with ARIMA errors using Fourier terms for weekly + yearly seasonality
```{r include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(forecast)
library(readr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
# 2) Split data exactly as requested
train_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2005-01-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2010-06-30"))

valid_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2010-07-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2010-07-31"))

full_train_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2005-01-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2011-06-30"))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# 3) Create time series objects
# Multiple seasonality: weekly + annual
ts_train_msts <- msts(
  train_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

ts_valid_msts <- msts(
  valid_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

ts_full_msts <- msts(
  full_train_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

# quick plot
autoplot(ts_train_msts) +
  ggtitle("Training Daily Electricity Load")
```

```{r}
# 4) Validation metric helper, only mape is required but rmse created for reference
rmse <- function(actual, predicted) {
  sqrt(mean((actual - predicted)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
}

mape <- function(actual, predicted) {
  mean(abs((actual - predicted) / actual), na.rm = TRUE) * 100
}
```

```{r}
# 5) Model 1: TBATS (tuned)
fit_tbats <- tbats(
  ts_train_msts,
  use.box.cox = NULL,
  use.trend = TRUE,
  use.damped.trend = TRUE,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

fc_tbats <- forecast(fit_tbats, h = 31)
```

```{r}
# 6) Model 2: ETS+STL
fit_stlf <- stlf(
  ts_train_msts,
  method = "ets",
  lambda = "auto",
  biasadj = TRUE,
  s.window = "periodic"
)

fc_stlf <- forecast(fit_stlf, h = 31)
```

```{r}
# 7) Model 3: ARIMA + Fourier
#    Tune Fourier terms using validation RMSE
best_dhr <- list(
  rmse = Inf,
  K_week = NA,
  K_year = NA,
  fit = NULL,
  fc = NULL
)
```

```{r}
# search grid; keep it moderate so runtime stays reasonable
for (K_week in 1:2) {
  for (K_year in 3:6) {
    xreg_train <- fourier(ts_train_msts, K = c(K_week, K_year))
    xreg_valid <- fourier(ts_train_msts, K = c(K_week, K_year), h = 31)

    fit_try <- auto.arima(
      ts_train_msts,
      xreg = xreg_train,
      seasonal = FALSE,          # seasonality handled by Fourier terms
      stepwise = TRUE,
      approximation = TRUE,
      lambda = "auto",
      biasadj = TRUE
    )

    fc_try <- forecast(fit_try, xreg = xreg_valid, h = 31)

    rmse_try <- rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_try$mean))

    if (rmse_try < best_dhr$rmse) {
      best_dhr$rmse <- rmse_try
      best_dhr$K_week <- K_week
      best_dhr$K_year <- K_year
      best_dhr$fit <- fit_try
      best_dhr$fc <- fc_try
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# 8) Compare validation performance
results <- tibble(
  model = c("TBATS", "ETS+STL", "ARIMA+Fourier"),
  RMSE = c(
    rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_tbats$mean)),
    rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_stlf$mean)),
    rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(best_dhr$fc$mean))
  ),
  MAPE = c(
    mape(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_tbats$mean)),
    mape(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_stlf$mean)),
    mape(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(best_dhr$fc$mean))
  )
) %>%
  arrange(RMSE)

print(results)

# plot best validation forecast
best_model_name <- results$model[1]
```
```{r}
# ARIMA + Fourier is performing the best
  final_xreg_train <- fourier(
    ts_full_msts,
    K = c(best_dhr$K_week, best_dhr$K_year)
  )

  final_xreg_future <- fourier(
    ts_full_msts,
    K = c(best_dhr$K_week, best_dhr$K_year),
    h = h_final
  )

  final_fit <- auto.arima(
    ts_full_msts,
    xreg = final_xreg_train,
    seasonal = FALSE,
    stepwise = FALSE,
    approximation = FALSE,
    lambda = "auto",
    biasadj = TRUE
  )

final_fc <- forecast(final_fit, xreg = final_xreg_future, h = 31)
```

```{r}
# build submission file
submission <- data.frame(
  date = seq(as.Date("2011-07-01"), as.Date("2011-07-31"), by = "day"),
  load = as.numeric(final_fc$mean)
)

write.csv(
  submission,
  file = here("Output", "submission_arima_fourier.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = TRUE
)
```


# 04 adding external
```{r}
# Scale Xreg
xreg_ext_train <- scale(train_data %>%
  select(daily_temp, daily_humidity))

xreg_ext_valid <- scale(valid_data %>%
  select(daily_temp, daily_humidity))
```

```{r}
for (K_week in 1:2) {
  for (K_year in 4:5) {

    fourier_train <- fourier(ts_train_msts, K = c(K_week, K_year))
    fourier_valid <- fourier(ts_train_msts, K = c(K_week, K_year), h = 31)

    # combine Fourier + external regressors
    xreg_train <- cbind(fourier_train, xreg_ext_train)
    xreg_valid <- cbind(fourier_valid, xreg_ext_valid)

    fit_try <- auto.arima(
      ts_train_msts,
      xreg = xreg_train,
      seasonal = FALSE,
      stepwise = TRUE,
      approximation = TRUE,
      lambda = "auto",
      biasadj = TRUE
    )

    fc_try <- forecast(fit_try, xreg = xreg_valid, h = 31)

    rmse_try <- rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_try$mean))

    if (rmse_try < best_dhr$rmse) {
      best_dhr$rmse <- rmse_try
      best_dhr$K_week <- K_week
      best_dhr$K_year <- K_year
      best_dhr$fit <- fit_try
      best_dhr$fc <- fc_try
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
xreg_ext_full <- full_train_data %>%
  select(daily_temp, daily_humidity) %>%
  as.matrix()
```

```{r}
final_xreg_train <- cbind(
  fourier(
    ts_full_msts,
    K = c(best_dhr$K_week, best_dhr$K_year)
  ),
  xreg_ext_full
)

final_xreg_future <- cbind(
  fourier(
    ts_full_msts,
    K = c(best_dhr$K_week, best_dhr$K_year),
    h = 31
  ),
  xreg_ext_full
)

final_fit <- auto.arima(
  ts_full_msts,
  xreg = final_xreg_train,
  seasonal = FALSE,
  stepwise = FALSE,
  approximation = FALSE,
  lambda = "auto",
  biasadj = TRUE
)

final_fc <- forecast(final_fit, xreg = final_xreg_future, h = 31)
```
